nasb.text: Then the king went off to his palace and spent the night fasting, and no entertainment was brought before him; and his sleep fled from him.

esv.text: Then the king went to his palace and spent the night fasting; no diversions were brought to him, and sleep fled from him.

cnv.text: 王回到宮裡，整夜沒有吃東西，也不要任何娛樂解悶，並且睡不著覺。

ccb.text: 王回宫后，整夜禁食，拒绝娱乐，无法入睡。
